total number of diseases or conditions of an individual. 

CCW provides unique data file variable names for each variable in the MOFs, so it is easy to trace which version of the 
HCCs is in the data. If a beneficiary has more than one condition within a particular HCC hierarchy, CMS uses only the 
most severe condition when determining his or her risk score. Each condition variable has a value of 1 if the 
beneficiary had the condition in the prior year;
